attacking_style: Launches late, decisive solo attacks in final 1-3km, particularly effective on punchy uphill finishes and can also succeed on flat sprints with precise timing. Prefers single explosive move over multiple probing attacks.
team_tactics: Operates with high autonomy, often exploiting moments when favorites mark each other. Limited evidence of heavy team support, suggesting opportunistic rather than pre-planned setups.
terrain_preference: Punchy climbing finishes and final 3km gradients where power-to-weight ratio matters. Can also win flat sprints from reduced groups with well-timed late attacks. Struggles on pure sprint stages against dedicated sprinters.
vulnerability: Cannot defend intermediate sprint competitions against pure sprinters (lost green jersey rapidly). Limited domestique support visible, making him reliant on perfect timing rather than controlled leadouts.
key_patterns: Attacks in final 1-3km with single decisive move (3 documented wins/podiums)
Succeeds on punchy uphill finishes requiring explosive acceleration (Tirreno evidence across 2 years)
Times attacks when favorites engage each other, exploiting tactical gaps (2022 Tirreno podium)
Breakthrough performances in stage races rather than one-day events (Giro, Tour wins)
Can catch and drop breakaway companions on final climbs (Giro 2021 solo victory)
form_trajectory: neutral: Won breakthrough Tour stage in July 2023 but immediately lost jersey, suggesting peak moments rather than sustained dominance. No recent 2024 data to confirm progression.
